'''kasuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachidonoyl|arachidonoyl]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-s-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachidonoyl|arachidonoyl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kasuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || kæsivith || kæsivij || kæsivish || kæsivi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || kasusuvuth || kasusuvuj || kasusuvush || kasusuvu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || kasuvuth || kasuvuj || kasuvush || kasuvu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || kasufvufth || kasufvufj || kasufvufsh || kasufvuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || kasuvuthu || kasuvuju || kasuvushu || kasuvuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || kasuvuth || kasuvuj || kasuvush || kasuvu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || kasuvuthul || kasuvujul || kasuvushul || kasuvukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || kasuvuuthuthu || kasuvuujuju || kasuvuushushu || kasuvuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || kasuvuthun || kasuvujun || kasuvushun || kasuvukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || kasuvuthuoro || kasuvujuoro || kasuvushuoro || kasuvukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
